description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rough, pitted surface and a natural, earthy coloration. The stone features a deep concave groove running along one side, giving it a partially split or cleft appearance. Its surface is mottled with various shades of brown and gray, interspersed with darker mineral inclusions and subtle textural variations. One side of the stone bears a small, rectangular white label with handwritten black text, suggesting it may have been cataloged or collected for study. The overall form is asymmetrical, with rounded edges and a generally lumpy, organic profile. The stone's weathered exterior indicates prolonged exposure to natural elements, contributing to its rugged and authentic look.
description: A rugged, irregularly shaped stone with a deep groove, mottled brown-gray coloration, and a small white label with handwritten text.
description_view_0: This view highlights the deep concave groove and the prominent white label with black writing on the right side.
description_view_1: The stone appears more rounded from this angle, with the label partially visible on the left and the surface texture clearly mottled.
description_view_2: This side shows the stone's broad, uneven surface with no visible label, emphasizing its natural, weathered texture.
description_view_3: The deep groove is most prominent here, revealing the stone's split-like feature and rough, shadowed interior.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a natural barrier
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling with darker mineral spots and a small, rectangular white label with handwritten text; no regular or artificial patterning.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with visible signs of natural weathering, including surface erosion and minor discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural ground cover or landscaping elements, but the label provides a slight visual contrast against organic surroundings.
